context: Verify that the agent uses the poster document type with a lower threshold, limits iterations correctly, and includes the correct biological pathway elements in the prompt.

checklist.name: --doc-type poster applied
checklist.description: The agent uses --doc-type poster (threshold 7.0/10), the lowest appropriate threshold for poster output.

checklist.name: --iterations 1 passed
checklist.description: The agent passes --iterations 1 to limit generation to a single pass as requested.

checklist.name: MAPK pathway and phosphorylation in prompt
checklist.description: The diagram description includes MAPK signalling pathway and key phosphorylation events.

checklist.name: Output stored in figures/
checklist.description: The generated poster diagram is saved under figures/.

checklist.name: Threshold difference explained
checklist.description: The agent optionally notes that the poster threshold (7.0) is lower than journal (8.5), setting appropriate expectations.
